creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thank you for the update.

If the new version is backwards-incompatible, it might make sense to create a new port for it.  But that's up to you and your judgement.

You should in any way check if you can use the GO_MODULE mechanism to get rid of the big GH_TUPLE list in the 0.5.0 release (not sure if we already discussed this).

Also, is there a changelog for this update?
